text: Sympathy is a knife, fame is a gun, food is a schmood. To be put in a schmood I'm gonna pull a food card. Just kind of, you know, not trying to do much character, just kind of do a normal kind of normal person food card pull. Yeah. So we have the marshmallow sheet pit. This was my dog who died. Thanks, thanks Obama. And she was a little queen. So go ahead and treat yourself like a queen. Buy yourself a boyfriend because money can buy love. Kiss me on the mouth. Good night, I love you.
